top.title: All six crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
top.summary: The US Central Command says all six crew members died after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

top.title: 'Tigers and flies': Millions of officials later, why is Xi's corruption purge still going?
top.summary: Critics say Xi's purges reveal a ruthless drive for absolute loyalty and total control of the military.

top.title: Ukraine and allies fear easing Russian sanctions will prolong war
top.summary: Ukraine's president says the US decision "certainly does not help achieve peace".

top.title: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
top.summary: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.

top.title: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
top.summary: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

top.title: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
top.summary: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.
